name: 本店招牌銷魂麵皆為微辣產品，如完全不吃辣、不吃鴨血、不加蔥、香菜，請在備註欄註記。只有銷魂麵能做不辣！
category: ▮ 注意事項 ▮ Please note that
desc: — Our signature noodles are mildly spicy. If you do not eat spicy food, duck blood, scallions, or cilantro, please note it in the special instructions. Only the signature noodles can be made non-spicy.

name: 過敏提醒：套餐含蠶豆、雞蛋、小麥、米酒、奶類（含鮮奶油等乳製品）、花生、堅果、芝麻類等食材，對上述食材過敏者不建議食用。
category: ▮ 注意事項 ▮ Please note that
desc: — Allergen notice: The set meal contains broad beans, eggs, wheat, rice wine, dairy (including cream and other milk products), peanuts, tree nuts, and sesame. Not recommended for those with allergies to these ingredients.
